title: Adding T-Shirts Together

segments.narration: Let's count how many T-shirts we have when we add one more!
Here are 1 T-shirt, and now we add another one for a total of 2.
Now, can you try adding 3 T-shirts and 1 more together?
Great job adding! We learned adding makes more together.

teacherNotes: Encourage students to visualize the addition with physical objects or drawings.
